member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.Internal.IServiceStoreProxy
member.summary: A proxy to service store to make the service testable.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.IServiceStoreProxy.GetAllSessionContextProvidable
member.summary: Get all session context providable services from ServiceStore.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService
member.summary: Session Service internal interface.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.SetCurrentThreadSessionContextContainer(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Set the container of the running thread.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.RemoveCurrentThreadSessionContextProviderContainer
member.summary: Removes the current thread container from storage.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.SetCurrentThreadLogger(MPE.MIT.Logging.Context.IContextLogger)
member.summary: Set the logger of the running thread.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.RemoveCurrentThreadLogger
member.summary: Removes the current thread logger from storage.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.CreateBasicSessionContextProviderContainer(System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new sessionContext container.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.Internal.ISessionService.CreateBasicSessionContextProviderContainer(System.String,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new sessionContext container.
member.param: whether to iterate through all services that has sessionContextProviders and populate them. Default is true.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.ISessionService
member.summary: Session service interface.

summary.para: Gets the current thread session context provider container, if previously set.

remarks.para: If current thread didn't set the container before, this function will throw FatalException.
In a regular flow this function is not expected to throw.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionService.TryGetCurrentThreadSessionContextContainer(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer@)

summary.para: Tries to get the current thread session context provider container, if previously set.

member.param: Session context container for current thread if available.
member.returns: True if session context container is available for current thread.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionService.GetCurrentThreadLogger

summary.para: Gets the current thread session logger, if previously set.

member.returns: Null if current thread didn't set the logger before, or the logger itself.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvidable
member.summary: Interface to define the concrete class provides session token services.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvidable.AddProviders(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer@)
member.summary: This method insert a new provider to the container using container.AddProviders(new SessionContextTokenProvider()).

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvider
member.summary: Provider interface.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvider.MsgId
member.summary: Gets the MessageId of this provider.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvider.Verify(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: In case a provider needs to refresh its data on instance's Verify it can implement that logic in this function.
member.param: The current sessionContextContainer, in case the Provider's Verify function requires any data from it.
The dictionary of the current instance's parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProvider.RefreshOnExecute(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: In case a provider needs to refresh its data on instance's Execute it can implement that logic in this function.
member.param: The current sessionContextContainer, in case the Provider's Verify function requires any data from it.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer
member.summary: Interface for all methods required to use by session context consumers.

summary.para: Registers or updates a provider based on its message Id.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer.GetResponse``1(System.Guid)

summary.para: Gets a response to a specific message stored in the container.

member.remarks: If the specific message ID doesn't have a provider, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer.VerifyAllProviders(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})

summary.para: To be called by Prime Kernel's Verify to refresh the providers data (if needed).

member.param: The dictionary of the current instance's parameters.

summary.para: To be called by Prime Kernel's Execute to refresh the providers data (if needed).

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextResponseHandler`1
member.summary: Interface for a sessionContext Provider.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextResponseHandler`1.HandleMessage
member.summary:
Any provider must implement this abstract method. Method should check from the message if the specific MsgId can be handled. If yes, down cast the message to the specific concrete response by Msg type. If incoming concrete response type doesn't match the Msg response type, an exception will be thrown.
The response is returned inside the response field.
member.returns: An object of type T based on the message Id.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods to shortcut the access to the InstanceMetaData properties from SessionContext.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions.GetInstanceName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions.GetIpName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the IP name.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions.GetDutId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the DutId name.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions.GetIpId(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the IpId name.

member.name: M:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaDataSessionContextExtensions.GetIds(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets both Dut and Ip ids.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider
member.summary: Provide SessionContext instance name.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Provide instance meta data.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider.InstanceMetaData.Name
member.summary: Gets the instance name.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider.InstanceMetaData.DutId
member.summary: Gets the instance dut id.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider.InstanceMetaData.IpId
member.summary: Gets the instance ip id.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider.InstanceMetaData.IpName
member.summary: Gets the instance ip name.

member.name: P:Prime.SessionService.InstanceMetaProvider.InstanceMetaData.Parameters
member.summary: Gets the instance parameters.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextProvider`1
member.summary: Defines a session context token provider. Any provider must implement the handleCommand API. See specific info in the method documentation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.SessionService.SessionContextProviderContainer
member.summary: Session context providers' container.

member.summary: SessionService implementation.
